prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/304-doc.pages in Pages. Select all text (Cmd+A) and set the line spacing to 1.5 (use the Format sidebar > Text > Spacing > 1.5 lines, or Format > Text > Spacing). Save. You may use the helper: cerebellum 'pages set_line_spacing ~/Desktop/kinbench/304-doc.pages 1.5'. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/304-spacing-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
